emails.subject: TransPecos Model
emails.body: TransPecos Model Please find attached the model for the TransPecos Project. James

emails.subject: RE: TransPecos Model
emails.body: RE: TransPecos Model James: Can we scale this down a bit? As I mentioned to Kevin Hyatt yesterday, we just need a slimmed down version for them to get started with. If this is not possible, we can send them this. They are needing to review a model and run sensitivities for the returns. Things like the MLP should be deleted. Kevin

emails.subject: TransPecos Model
emails.body: TransPecos Model I find a error in the model. It did not include the A G Expenses in the dcf and earnings worksheet. The attached model has been corrected. thanks, James
